name: io.github.jarmstrong158/context-keeper
description: Project memory for Claude: decisions, pipelines, and constraints across conversations. Complete capture loop with session-start retrieval, in-line recording, and pre-compaction capture prompts.

environmentVariables.name: CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the project directory. If omitted, uses cwd only when it already contains a .context/ directory; otherwise tools require explicit project_dir.
